text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two other Umamusume debut several months
after Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As both friends and worthy rivals, Narita Taishin
believes in them, and the three all have their
sights set on the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's determined not to lose and
throws herself into training to prepare for the
inevitable battles against her companions.
